title: juncus compressus
intro: Juncus compressus, also known as round-leaf rush or round-leaved rush, is a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Juncus compressus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Juncus compressus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical and internal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
